name: Cranberry Chews
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Cranberry sauce with whole berries
recipeInstructions:
DESCRIPTION: Chewy Cranberry Oat Bars with an oat-nut topping.
PREHEAT the oven to 350°F. GREASE a 10x15 inch jellyroll pan or a 9x13 inch pan.
IN A LARGE BOWL, COMBINE the flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt.
USING YOUR FINGERS OR A SPOON, CUT IN THE COLD BUTTER UNTIL THE MIXTURE RESEMBLES COARSE MEAL.
STIR IN THE OATS. SET ASIDE 1 1/2 cups OF THE MIXTURE.
FIRMLY PRESS THE REMAINING MIXTURE INTO THE BOTTOM OF THE PREPARED PAN.
BAKE for 15 minutes. LET COOL for 10 minutes before filling.
IN A MEDIUM BOWL, COMBINE the cranberry sauce, marmalade, and vanilla extract.
SLIGHTLY ADD THE REMAINING 1/3 CUP FLOUR, BLENDING THOROUGHLY.
SPREAD EVENLY OVER THE COOKED AND COOLED CRUST.
ADD THE CHOPPED WALNUTS TO THE SET ASIDE OAT MIXTURE AND SPOON OVER THE TOP OF THE FRUIT FILING.
BAKE FOR AN ADDITIONAL 30 MINUTES OR UNTIL LIGHTLY BROWNED. LET COOL IN THE PAN ON A WIRE RACK BEFORE CUTTING INTO 64 BARS.
STORE IN AN AIRTIGHT CONTAINER FOR UP TO ONE WEEK, OR FREEZE FOR LONGER STORAGE.
